scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --manifest-path wasm/sim-core/Cargo.toml --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p src/sim/wasm && cp wasm/sim-core/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/sim_core.wasm src/sim/wasm/sim_core.wasm
scripts.test:architecture: npm run test:steps && python3 tests/sim-worker-smoke.py && python3 tests/architecture-overlay-smoke.py
scripts.build:architecture: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:sim-worker && npm run build:ui
